description: User scrolls down in the 'Filter Opportunities' modal, moving from the 'Task Type' section to the 'Duration' and 'Pay Rate' sections.
frame_description: The filter modal scrolls vertically, hiding the task type chips and bringing the duration and pay rate controls into view.

description: User pauses to review the filter options currently visible on the screen.
frame_description: The screen remains static as the user examines the 'Duration' and 'Pay Rate' filter settings.

description: User scrolls further down in the 'Filter Opportunities' modal to reveal device type selection (Mobile, Desktop, Either) and the 'Advanced' section.
frame_description: The modal content scrolls up again, showing radio buttons for device compatibility and the start of the advanced filters.
